import{useState,useEffect}from'react';/**
 * useLocalStorage — syncs state with localStorage.
 * @param {string} key - localStorage key
 * @param {*} initialValue - default value if key is absent
 */function useLocalStorage(key,initialValue){const[storedValue,setStoredValue]=useState(()=>{try{const item=window.localStorage.getItem(key);return item?JSON.parse(item):initialValue;}catch(error){console.warn(`useLocalStorage: could not read key "${key}"`,error);return initialValue;}});const setValue=value=>{try{const valueToStore=value instanceof Function?value(storedValue):value;setStoredValue(valueToStore);window.localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(valueToStore));}catch(error){console.warn(`useLocalStorage: could not write key "${key}"`,error);}};return[storedValue,setValue];}export default useLocalStorage;
